questions.question: Known for his arrogance, nudity, and mad fishing skills, this two-time jailbird was the winner of the very first season of Survivor.
This was a digital character that resembled the user and acted for the person online.
What boy band traveled around the world in 100 hours to promote their album "Black and Blue"?
What sex offender and serial killer was convicted of 17 murders, and then killed by a fellow inmate in 1994?
What sarcastic hashtag follows a picture of a project that went hilariously wrong?
